category_title: Preschoolers with autism exhibiting high unengagement and rigid object manipulation
scenario_title: Animal puzzle completion during structured centers
minimal_context: The student is sitting at a table during structured centers working on completing an animal puzzle.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for structured centers. Here is the animal puzzle. Please put the pieces in the board.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Picks up an animal puzzle piece and stares at it, remaining entirely object-focused without looking at the teacher.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying. Put the piece in.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Starts moving the animal puzzle piece across the table as if it were walking and making corresponding animal sounds.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to finish completing your puzzle.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Ignores the puzzle board and continues to manipulate the toy in a rigid, stereotyped manner, slipping from the puzzle activity into a state of unengagement with the teacher.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for structured centers. Here is the animal puzzle. Please put the pieces in the board.

STUDENT: (Picks up an animal puzzle piece and stares at it, remaining entirely object-focused without looking at the teacher.)

TUTOR: Keep trying. Put the piece in.

STUDENT: (Starts moving the animal puzzle piece across the table as if it were walking and making corresponding animal sounds.)

TUTOR: You need to finish completing your puzzle.

STUDENT: (Ignores the puzzle board and continues to manipulate the toy in a rigid, stereotyped manner, slipping from the puzzle activity into a state of unengagement with the teacher.)

task.learning_goal: completing the objectives of the activity

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: when she started moving the animal puzzle pieces as if they were walking and making corresponding animal sounds
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: manipulate toys or objects in a rigid or stereotyped manner

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: object-focused with less frequent engagement of others into their play activities
slip from object-engaged states to states of unengagement
